productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue denim trousers with a stone washed look, has two side pockets with a patch pocket above the right one, two large back pockets with stitch detailing, comfortable waist with loops and embroidered Big Ben Logo on the back right, zippered and buttoned closure and reinforced stitch detailing on the crotch area Fitting Slim boot Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these slim boot jeans from united colors of benetton. Perfect for casual outings with friends, this denim trouser looks great with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 42" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
